message:
refactor(cli): unify agent type normalization across all CLI commands

Replace every independent agent-type switch-case in the CLI layer with
calls to the shared resolver (robot.ResolveAgentType or
agent.AgentType.Canonical()):

- cli/respawn.go: normalizeAgentType() now delegates to ResolveAgentType
- cli/assign.go: resolveAgentTypeFilter() uses ResolveAgentType instead
  of bare ToLower
- cli/controller.go: buildControllerResponse() switches on ResolveAgentType
  output instead of maintaining its own alias map
- cli/spawn.go: resolveSpawnAssignAgentType() and parseLocalFallbackProvider()
  use Canonical() for consistent alias handling
- cli/ensemble.go: move normalizeEnsembleAgentType() here from
  ensemble_spawn.go and rewrite using Canonical(), adding support for
  cursor, windsurf, aider, ollama
- assign/capability.go: delegate to Canonical() for type resolution

All tests updated to cover extended aliases (claude_code, codex-cli,
google-gemini, ws, spaced inputs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -236,24 +237,24 @@ func GetAgentScoreByString(agentType string, taskType string) float64 {
 // ParseAgentType converts a string to AgentType.
 // Supports both short codes (cc, cod, gmi) and full names (claude, codex, gemini).
 func ParseAgentType(s string) tmux.AgentType {
-	s = strings.ToLower(s)
-	switch s {
-	case "cc", "claude":
+	trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(s)
+	switch agent.AgentType(trimmed).Canonical() {
+	case agent.AgentTypeClaudeCode:
 		return tmux.AgentClaude
-	case "cod", "codex":
+	case agent.AgentTypeCodex:
 		return tmux.AgentCodex
-	case "gmi", "gemini":
+	case agent.AgentTypeGemini:
 		return tmux.AgentGemini
-	case "cursor":
+	case agent.AgentTypeCursor:
 		return tmux.AgentCursor
-	case "windsurf":
+	case agent.AgentTypeWindsurf:
 		return tmux.AgentWindsurf
-	case "aider":
+	case agent.AgentTypeAider:
 		return tmux.AgentAider
-	case "ollama":
+	case agent.AgentTypeOllama:
 		return tmux.AgentOllama
 	default:
-		return tmux.AgentType(s)
+		return tmux.AgentType(strings.ToLower(trimmed))
 	}
 }

+func normalizeEnsembleAgentType(value string) string {
+	switch agentpkg.AgentType(value).Canonical() {
+	case agentpkg.AgentTypeClaudeCode:
+		return "cc"
+	case agentpkg.AgentTypeCodex:
+		return "cod"
+	case agentpkg.AgentTypeGemini:
+		return "gmi"
+	case agentpkg.AgentTypeCursor:
+		return "cursor"
+	case agentpkg.AgentTypeWindsurf:
+		return "windsurf"
+	case agentpkg.AgentTypeAider:
+		return "aider"
+	case agentpkg.AgentTypeOllama:
+		return "ollama"
+	default:
+		return ""
+	}
+}
+
 func newEnsembleCmd() *cobra.Command {
 	opts := ensembleSpawnOptions{
 		Assignment: "affinity",
